name: preconfin-qbo-xero-migrator
description: Standalone PreconFin QBO to Xero migration utility.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/canonical-model && npm run build -w packages/migration-engine && npm run build -w packages/validation-engine && npm run build -w packages/pdf-report && npm run build -w packages/xero-export && npm run build -w packages/shared-ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/canonical-model && npm run test -w packages/migration-engine && npm run test -w packages/validation-engine && npm run test -w packages/pdf-report && npm run test -w packages/xero-export && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run deploy:staging -w apps/api && npm run pages:build:staging -w apps/web && npm run deploy:staging -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run deploy:production -w apps/api && npm run pages:build:production -w apps/web && npm run deploy:production -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run deploy:dry-run -w apps/api && npm run pages:build:staging -w apps/web && npm run deploy:dry-run -w apps/web
